moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America is well underway, with group stage matches dominating screens and conversations across the UK and globally.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: Morning! Who's recovering from last night's World Cup action? Any upsets or standout performances you're still talking about? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: Big game coming up for [Team Name] today/tonight! Where are you watching? Predictions? Let's hear 'em! #Football

angles.name: UK Fan Reaction
angles.copy: The World Cup buzz is real! From pub gardens to living rooms, the UK is gripped. What's been your favourite moment of the tournament so far?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2026 Concludes
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival wraps up today (Sunday, June 21st), after four days of music featuring headliners like The Cure, Lewis Capaldi, and Calvin Harris.

angles.name: Festival Wrap Up
angles.copy: That's a wrap for Isle of Wight Festival 2026! Who caught the final sets today? What were your highlights from the weekend?

angles.name: Favourite Moment
angles.copy: From Lewis Capaldi's singalongs to The Cure's legendary performance, Isle of Wight delivered! What was your unforgettable moment?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival 2026 Finishes Today
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green's TRNSMT Festival concludes today, Sunday June 21st, after a weekend packed with performances from headline acts including Lewis Capaldi, Richard Ashcroft, and Kasabian.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Goodbye
angles.copy: TRNSMT 2026 is officially over! Hope you had an incredible time on Glasgow Green. Who stole the show for you this year?

angles.name: Best of TRNSMT
angles.copy: What a weekend at TRNSMT! From Kasabian's energy to Lewis Capaldi's return, what's your favourite memory from the festival?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Turns 73
moments.blurb: The iconic 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' singer Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday tomorrow, June 22nd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Cyndi
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Cyndi Lauper turns 73! What's your go-to track from this absolute legend? #CyndiLauper

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday tomorrow! Still rocking those 'True Colors' and showing us that 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun'!

moments.title: Carly Simon Turns 83
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain' and 'Nobody Does It Better', celebrates her 83rd birthday on June 25th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Carly
angles.copy: On June 25th, we're celebrating the incredible Carly Simon's 83rd birthday! Which of her timeless tracks is your favourite?

angles.name: 70s Songbird
angles.copy: The voice behind 'You're So Vain', Carly Simon turns 83 this week. Her songs are still as powerful today as they were in the 70s!

moments.title: Chris Isaak Turns 70
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice behind 'Wicked Game' and 'Blue Hotel', Chris Isaak, celebrates his 70th birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chris
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 70th Birthday to Chris Isaak on June 26th! What's your favourite track from the 'Wicked Game' crooner?

angles.name: Rockabilly Legend
angles.copy: Chris Isaak hits the big 7-0 this week! Get ready for some 'Wicked Game' and more as we celebrate his birthday on June 26th.

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for hits like 'Thank U, Next' and '7 Rings', celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ariana
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande on June 26th! What's your ultimate Ariana anthem?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Celebrate Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday this week! From Broadway to global pop domination, she's still breaking records.

moments.title: H.E.R. Turns 29
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B artist H.E.R. (Gabriella Sarmiento Wilson) celebrates her 29th birthday on June 27th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday H.E.R.
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 29th Birthday to the immensely talented H.E.R. on June 27th! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: H.E.R. turns 29 this week! The multi-talented R&B sensation continues to inspire with her powerful vocals and songwriting.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships kick off on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of elite grass-court tennis to London.

angles.name: Tennis Time
angles.copy: It's almost time for Wimbledon! The Championships begin Monday, June 29th. Who are you backing for the titles this year?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Wimbledon fever is about to sweep London! Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis, strawberries and cream. Are you queueing?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48
moments.blurb: Former Pussycat Dolls lead singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Nicole
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish her a Happy Birthday? Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on June 29th! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Nicole Scherzinger's 48th birthday this week! From pop charts to judging panels, she's still a superstar.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The BST Hyde Park concert series begins on June 26th, bringing major artists to London's iconic park throughout the summer.

angles.name: Hyde Park Calling
angles.copy: BST Hyde Park kicks off this week! London's biggest summer concert series is back. Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: Summer Gigs
angles.copy: Get ready for some massive gigs in Hyde Park as BST begins! Who's excited for summer concerts in the capital?

moments.title: Debbie Harry Turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie frontwoman and new wave icon Debbie Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Debbie
angles.copy: The legendary Debbie Harry turns 81 on July 1st! 'Heart of Glass' or 'Call Me'? What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: New Wave Queen
angles.copy: Still looking cool at 81! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the iconic Debbie Harry this week. A true pioneer of new wave.

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Multi-award-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy 'Misdemeanor' Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Missy
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st! What's your favourite track from this hip-hop icon?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Missy Elliott's 55th birthday this week! Her influence on music and culture is undeniable.
